overview.description: The State Street My2031 Municipal Bond ETF (MYMK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of investment grade municipal bonds with effective maturities in 2031. Bonds are USD-denominated. MYMK was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
